message:
fix(web): correct Vary header merging and session fixation cookie expiry

Middleware (Vary header):
- Rewrite append_vary_header() to properly merge mixed-case Vary headers
  (e.g. "Vary: Accept-Language" and "vary: origin") into a single
  canonical lowercase header without duplicates
- Extract push_vary_token() helper for case-insensitive dedup
- Remove all existing Vary headers before setting merged value
- Add tests: compression_merges_mixed_case_vary_header and
  cors_merges_mixed_case_vary_header_without_duplicates

Session:
- SessionMiddleware now actively expires unknown-but-valid session IDs
  on read-only requests (previously left attacker-supplied fixation
  cookies in place when handler didn't mutate session state)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
